content:
<@129305432891195393>  timed-me out for posting this. Hilarious, biased fart faces want to tell you what to implement.

That post-quantum algorithm that standardized by NIST got cracked on a weekend on a single notebook. It’s a scam what NIST have. Intentionally limiting security levels because “no need for more” and encourage even to aim for maximum performance over SECURITY completely ignoring Moore’s Law.
